item.title: RT by @Dinosn: 💥 Introducing "Januscape" (CVE-2026-53359) A Guest-to-Host Escape in KVM/x86 exploiting a UAF in the shadow MMU. Triggerable on both Intel and AMD hosts. Threatens x86 public clouds (GC
item.description: p💥 Introducing "Januscape" (CVE-2026-53359) br /br /A Guest-to-Host Escape in KVM/x86 exploiting a UAF in the shadow MMU. Triggerable on both Intel and AMD hosts. Threatens x86 public clouds (GCP, AWS) that expose nested virtualization. br /br /"16 years" latent. Successfully used as a 0-day explo

item.title: France to Stop Certifying Non-Quantum-Safe Encryption
item.description: pFrance is a href="https://www.reuters.com/legal/litigation/france-stop-certifying-products-without-quantum-safe-encryption-2026-06-16/"accelerating/a its transition to post-quantum encryption:/pblockquotepFrance&#8217;s cybersecurity agency ANSSI said on Tuesday it would stop certifying security pr
